---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] All family members
- [ ] Family admins / organizers
- [ ] Super admins
- [ ] Elderly / accessibility-focused users
- [ ] Multi-family users
- [ ] Other (please specify):

**How often would you use this feature?**
- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] Monthly
- [ ] Occasionally
- [ ] One-time setup

## Implementation Ideas

**If you have ideas about implementation, share them here:**
- UI mockups or wireframes
- API changes
- Database schema changes

**Are you willing to contribute?**
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a pull request
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing
- [ ] Yes, I can help with documentation
- [ ] No, but I'd love to see this implemented

## Additional Context

**Screenshots or examples:**
Add any screenshots, mockups, or examples that help explain the feature.

**Similar features in other apps:**
If you've seen this feature in other applications, link to them or describe how they work.

---

**Before submitting:**
- [ ] I've searched existing issues to ensure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I've described the problem this feature solves
- [ ] I've considered how this fits with FamilyCircle's existing features
